def positive_per_item_deduplication_uses_list_instead_of_hash_index():
    rule_id = "per_item_deduplication_uses_list_instead_of_hash_index"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag high-cardinality deduplication done with linear container membership checks."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
